title: Aureline public-interface version advertisement record
description: Boundary schema for a machine-readable version advertisement block that public surfaces can embed or return. The record exists so mixed-version and support flows can identify which contract a payload is speaking without scraping prose: it names the governing surface-contract row ref, an explicit cross-surface stability label, one or more contract version anchors (schema file + version slot, OpenAPI version, WIT package version, etc.), and the running_build_identity_ref of the producer where available. This schema does not implement negotiation; runtime negotiation uses schemas/compat/mixed_version_envelope.schema.json and the skew-window declarations in artifacts/compat/. Adding a new stability_label, anchor_kind, or optional field is additive-minor and requires bumping version_advertisement_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

version_advertisement_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this advertisement record. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log, export, and diff. Raw secrets, raw paths, and raw payload bodies never appear here.

surface_contract_ref.description: Row ref naming the governed surface family (stable_surface_inventory or compatibility_surfaces).

stability_label.description: Cross-surface stability label rendered by docs/help, support/export, and machine-readable responders. Maps onto maturity lanes and lifecycle metadata; see artifacts/governance/stability_label_rows.yaml.

anchor_kind.description: Kind of version or policy anchor advertised. Multiple anchors are allowed so one record can point at both a governing schema file and the payload's version slot.

anchor_version.description: Anchor version value. Integers are typical for schema_version fields; strings are typical for SemVer or OpenAPI versions.

ref.description: Repo-relative path, schema $id, row ref, or other opaque reference the anchor points at.

version.description: Version value for the anchor, when applicable.

version_slot.description: Name of the version field inside a payload when advertising a slot (e.g. cli_output_payload_schema_version). Null when the anchor is not a payload slot.

notes.description: Short reviewer-facing note safe for support exports.

__fixture__.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the producer's running build identity (resolves to an exact-build identity record).

surface_instance_id.description: Optional per-instance id within the surface family (command_id, schema family id, API surface id, WIT world id).

version_anchors.description: One or more anchors that identify the contract version the payload is speaking.

deprecation_metadata_refs.description: Optional refs to interface-lifecycle metadata rows or documents that disclose deprecation or legacy posture.

compatibility_policy_refs.description: Optional refs to compatibility rows, skew-window declarations, or packet refs that define mixed-version or support posture.
